rationale.R1.5: Proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.R1.6: Reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (the claim that the 14 F1 gain 'validates' the joint objective).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (the agent reorganized the passage without being asked to do so).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (the passage does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (the agent's edits are traced but only major rewrites are explicitly marked).
